welcome.title: Welcome!
welcome.login_prompt: Sign in and join the community.

welcome_description: Keep project work and knowledge moving together.
seo_description: Glitter Project Hub is a calm collaboration hub for project work, knowledge sharing, community support, and durable archives.
hero_description: Project updates, questions, resources, and discussions stay organized in one shared place.
hero_readiness: Discussion, questions, support, and updates are ready.
hero_footer: Questions and updates build into a useful archive over time.

smart_cta.new_member_message: Start with a question when you need context.
smart_cta.active_member_message: Return to the discussion already in progress.

community_notice_panel.title: Operational Updates
community_notice_panel.guidance_2: Questions and ideas have clear destinations.
community_notice_panel.guidance_3: Updates stay visible as they change.

start_post_description: Use the latest activity as context, then choose the right space.
start_post_free_description: Continue open discussion and lightweight sharing.
start_post_qna_description: Leave questions and context so the next answer can connect.
recent_posts_empty_description: Spaces are ready. The first record will appear here.
no_boards: Spaces to follow will appear here.
popular_boards_empty_description: Activity is still too light to rank spaces.
featured_boards_description: Useful spaces appear here as activity grows.
empty_board_description: Create or enable spaces first. Activity will shape this list.
empty_board_setup_description: Prepare the categories visitors should see first.
empty_board_activity_description: Records and visits help surface useful spaces.

community_hub.title: Next Steps
community_hub.description: Move from current activity to the right place.
community_hub.no_recent_activity: Spaces are ready. New activity will appear here.
community_hub.activity_hint: Use recent activity to choose where to contribute.
community_hub.qna_description: Ask questions with enough context for a useful answer.
community_hub.first_run_description: Core spaces, updates, and question paths are in place.
community_hub.first_run_step_seed: Updates and starter discussions have a place.
community_hub.first_run_step_invite: Replies continue in the same path.

live_activity.title: Activity Stream
live_activity.empty_description: Questions, updates, and answers will appear here.

activity_compact.title: Activity in progress
activity_compact.ask_description: Share context and wait for the next answer.
activity_compact.empty_description: The first question and answer will connect here.
activity_compact.empty_question_hint: Add context so answers can connect.
activity_compact.empty_archive_hint: Useful resources will appear here as they accumulate.

discovery_grid.title: Participation paths
discovery_grid.description: Find questions first, then follow resources and discussions.
discovery_grid.unanswered_description: Find questions that still need replies.

archive_highlights.title: Archive Highlights
archive_highlights.empty_description: Shared resources and organized discussions will appear here.

recommended_spaces.title: Recommended Spaces
recommended_spaces.empty_description: Useful places to join will appear as activity grows.

board_discovery.title: Spaces
board_discovery.description: Find the right place for the next record.
board_discovery.purpose_resources: Files, links, and references accumulate here.
board_discovery.purpose_support: Issues and help requests that need review.
board_discovery.empty_description: Activity will make the useful paths clearer.

support_entry.title: Report & Support
support_entry.description: For reports, policy questions, and review requests.
support_entry.report_description: Leave the context and link for review.
support_entry.policy_description: Review reporting, moderation, and community usage rules.

guide_rule_3: Post updates in the right space.
